responsibilities: Create buy-in vision with key decision makers by building executive relationships around Microsoft solution value.
Engage and jointly sell with partners and priority ISVs to maximize business outcomes.
Build business cases and customer proposals to substantiate solution value
Lead multi-million-dollar deals requiring orchestration of virtual teams across industry
and exceed sales or cloud consumption quota.
Share customer feedback and best practices to influence Microsoft go-to-market and product strategies.
requirements: 7+ years of technology-related sales or account management experience.
7+ years leading sales of large cloud engagements
especially infrastructure migration and application modernization projects for large or global enterprise customers.
Deep business expertise and technical knowledge within enterprise sales.
Ability to lead virtual teams of sales
Ability to support customers through AI and digital transformation journeys.
Ability to remove roadblocks to deployment and drive customer satisfaction.
preferredQualifications: Understanding of Microsoft Azure Cloud platform or other public cloud platforms.
Understanding of IaaS and PaaS technologies and how they translate into business impact.
Experience with cloud migration and modernization.
Knowledge of enterprise software solutions and cloud/datacenter infrastructure competitor landscape.
Understanding of partner ecosystems and ability to leverage partner solutions to solve customer needs.
parsed.employerSignal: Microsoft enterprise solution sales role focused on Azure consumption growth, executive relationship building, partner co-selling, cloud migration, modernization, AI, analytics, and large enterprise deal orchestration.
risks: Role is sales quota and cloud consumption driven.
Requires 7+ years technology sales or account management experience.
Requires experience leading large cloud engagements for large or global enterprise customers.
Work site requires 3 days per week in office.
parsed.fitNotes: Strong fit requires enterprise technology sales, Azure or public cloud platform fluency, executive stakeholder management, partner co-selling, pipeline ownership, and large-deal orchestration. Technical cloud knowledge alone is not enough without quota-carrying sales evidence.
